Town of Byron, NY | (585) 548-7123 – Welcome to the Town of Byron, New York — a community with deep roots, rich history, and small-town charm. Established in 1820 and named in honor of poet Lord Byron, our town has a colorful past shaped by its unique hamlets, historic landmarks, and nationally recognized Hiscock Archaeological Site, where mastodon remains and ancient artifacts are still being discovered. From the Bennet Mill to the Byron Museum, history comes alive here. Whether you’re a resident or a visitor, we invite you to explore, connect, and experience the warmth of our community.
